# JSONKits
> Free online JSON tools for developers — 300+ browser-based JSON utilities. All processing is 100% client-side with no server uploads.

## Info
- About: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/about
- Contact: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/contact
- Privacy: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/privacy
- Terms: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/terms

## Essential Tools
- JSON Formatter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-formatter
- JSON Validator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-validator
- JSON Viewer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-viewer
- JSON Minifier: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-minifier
- JSON Diff Checker: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-diff-checker
- JSON Search: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-search

## Converters
- JSON ↔ YAML: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-yaml
- JSON ↔ CSV: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-csv
- JSON ↔ XML: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-xml
- JSON ↔ TOML: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-toml
- JSON ↔ INI: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-ini
- JSON ↔ Properties: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-properties
- JSON ↔ TSV: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-tsv
- JSON ↔ HTML Table: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-html-table
- JSON ↔ Markdown Table: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-markdown-table
- JSON ↔ Plain Text: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-plain-text

## Code Generators (JSON → Language)
- JSON → TypeScript: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-typescript
- JSON → Python: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-python
- JSON → Go: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-go
- JSON → Java: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-java
- JSON → C#: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-csharp
- JSON → Rust: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-rust
- JSON → Kotlin: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-kotlin
- JSON → Swift: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-swift
- JSON → Dart: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-dart
- JSON → PHP: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-php-array
- JSON → Zod Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-zod-schema
- JSON → Prisma Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-prisma-schema
- JSON → Pydantic v2: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-pydantic-v2

## Reverse Generators (Language → JSON)
- TypeScript → JSON: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/typescript-interface-to-json
- Java → JSON: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/java-class-to-json
- Go → JSON: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/go-struct-to-json
- Python Dict → JSON: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/python-dict-to-json

## Database Tools
- JSON → SQL INSERT: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-sql-insert
- JSON → PostgreSQL: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-postgresql
- JSON → MySQL: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-mysql
- JSON → SQLite: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-sqlite
- JSON → MongoDB: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-mongodb
- JSON → Firestore: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-firestore
- JSON → DynamoDB: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-dynamodb
- JSON → Prisma Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-prisma-schema
- JSON → SQLAlchemy Model: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-sqlalchemy-model

## Validation & Security
- JSON Validator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-validator
- JSON Schema Validator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-schema-validator
- JSON Linter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-linter
- JSON Repair: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-repair
- JSON Escape: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-escape
- JSON Encrypt: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-encrypt
- JSON Decrypt: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-decrypt
- JSON Mask Data: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-mask-data
- JSON Data Anonymizer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-data-anonymizer
- JWT Decoder: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/jwt-decoder
- JWT Encoder: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/jwt-encoder
- JSON Hash Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-hash

## Comparison Tools
- JSON Diff Checker: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-diff-checker
- JSON Compare: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-compare
- JSON Version Diff: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-version-diff
- JSON Array Diff: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-array-diff
- JSON Schema Diff: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-schema-diff

## Data Generators
- Fake JSON Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-fake-generator
- Random JSON Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-random-generator
- Mock API Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-mock-generator
- Sample JSON Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-sample-generator
- JSON Schema Generator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-schema-generator

## Encoding & Web Formats
- JSON ↔ Base64: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-base64
- JSON ↔ Hex: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-hex
- JSON ↔ Binary: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-binary
- JSON ↔ URL Encoded: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-url-encoded
- JSON ↔ URL Parameters: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-url-params
- JSON ↔ Query String: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-query-string
- JSON ↔ JSONP: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-jsonp

## Edit & Transform
- JSON Sort Keys: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-sort-keys
- JSON Remove Nulls: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-remove-nulls
- JSON Remove Duplicates: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-remove-duplicates
- JSON Rename Keys: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-rename-keys
- JSON Filter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-filter
- JSON Merge: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-merge
- JSON Split: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-split
- JSON Slice: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-slice
- JSON Case Converter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-case-converter
- JSON Date Formatter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-date-formatter
- JSON Number Converter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-number-converter
- JSON Data Anonymizer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-data-anonymizer

## API Formats
- JSON → GraphQL Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-graphql-schema
- JSON → OpenAPI: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-openapi
- JSON → Swagger: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-swagger
- JSON → Postman Collection: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-postman
- JSON → cURL: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-curl
- JSON → AsyncAPI: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-asyncapi
- JSON → SOAP XML: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-soap

## Binary Serialization
- JSON ↔ MessagePack: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-messagepack
- JSON ↔ CBOR: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-cbor
- JSON ↔ Protocol Buffers: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-protobuf
- JSON ↔ Avro: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-avro
- JSON ↔ BSON: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-bson

## Export & Output
- JSON → PDF: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-pdf
- JSON → Word: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-word
- JSON → Excel: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-xlsx
- JSON → QR Code: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-qrcode
- JSON → SVG Image: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-image
- JSON → Markdown: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-markdown
- JSON → HTML: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-html
- JSON → Mermaid Diagram: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-mermaid
- JSON → Graphviz: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-graphviz

## Analysis
- JSON Size Calculator: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-size-calculator
- JSON Depth Analyzer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-depth-analyzer
- JSON Statistics: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-statistics
- JSON Key Counter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-key-counter
- JSON Type Detector: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-type-detector
- JSON String Analyzer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-string-analyzer
- JSON Value Analyzer: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-value-analyzer
- JSON Path Tester: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-path-tester
- JSON Pointer Tester: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-pointer-tester
- JMESPath Tester: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/jmespath-tester
- Path Notation Converter: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/path-notation-converter

## Developer Tools
- JSON to Zod Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-zod-schema
- JSON to Yup Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-yup-schema
- JSON to Prisma Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-prisma-schema
- JSON to Mongoose Schema: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-mongoose-schema
- JSON to TypeScript Enum: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-typescript-enum
- JSON to TypeScript Type Guard: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-type-guard
- JSON to Pydantic v2: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-pydantic-v2
- JSON to SQLAlchemy Model: https://jsonkitsnet.pages.dev/json-to-sqlalchemy-model
